description: Home画面用キャラクター生成依頼リスト

design.name: 星野 凛 (Hoshino Rin)
design.base_prompt: Anime style, 1girl, short black hair, purple eyes, calm expression, school uniform with blazer, green screen background, full body, standing pose
design.negative_prompt: realistic, 3d, low quality, bad anatomy, text, watermark, extra limbs, deformed

emotion_prompts.prompt: neutral expression, slight smile, looking at viewer
surprised expression, wide eyes, open mouth, blushing slightly
sleepy expression, half-closed eyes, yawning, relaxed posture
extremely happy, sparkling eyes, big smile, hearts around, blushing
angry expression, electric sparks, furrowed brows, clenched fists
embarrassed, blushing heavily, looking away, shy smile, hands on cheeks

design.name: 桜 澪 (Sakura Mio)
design.base_prompt: Anime style, 1girl, long pink hair, blue eyes, cheerful expression, maid outfit, green screen background, full body, cute pose
design.negative_prompt: realistic, 3d, low quality, bad anatomy, text, watermark, extra limbs, deformed

emotion_prompts.prompt: cheerful smile, hands clasped, looking at viewer
surprised, eyes wide, hands up, gasping
daydreaming, looking up, slight smile, relaxed
overjoyed, jumping, sparkles, heart eyes, very happy
pouting, puffed cheeks, annoyed expression, arms crossed
melting, very happy, closed eyes, blushing, steam from head

notes.green_screen: 背景はクロマキー処理のため緑一色を指定
notes.emotion_count: 各キャラクター6種類の表情が必要
